creator: sheldonh@starjuice.net
text:
On Tue, 28 Aug 2001 10:02:56 +0200, Matthias Andree wrote:

> Additional information, PERL_THREADED is not in /etc/defaults/make.conf
> as of RELENG_4_3 to date, but it still lingered around in /etc/make.conf
> and was heeded by the build systems.

Ah, okay, so it's not even in RELENG_4_3.  Great, that makes me much
happier. :-)

Ciao,
Sheldon.
